questions.question: What does tokenomics refer to?
options: The economic design of a token
The marketing strategy of a project
The price chart of a token
The social media presence of a project

questions.question: What is circulating supply?
options: The maximum number of tokens that can ever exist
The number of tokens currently available in the market
The number of wallets holding a token

questions.question: Why is token utility important?
options: It helps give the token a purpose within the ecosystem
